description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and production. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, uses the linux tag, and executes `bash ./bashell.sh -r`. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, uses the linux tag, is limited to the next and master branches, sets the environment name to staging, and runs `bash ./bashell.sh -r`. Add a production job that runs in the production stage, uses the linux tag, is limited to the master branch, sets the environment name to production, and runs `bash ./bashell.sh -r`.
